_comment: Reference stiffness matrices for the TRANSVERSELY ISOTROPIC 8-node hexahedral element on a UNIT CUBE (edge h=1), layer normal = +Z, full 2x2x2 Gauss integration (exact; verified vs 4x4x4 below). Authored and committed by the human maintainer via an independent Python/NumPy implementation (fixture discipline; DECISIONS.md provenance rule). Agents assert against these values; they do not edit this file. Node order, DOF order, Voigt order ([xx,yy,zz,gxy,gyz,gzx], ENGINEERING shear) and scaling K(E,h)=E*h*K_ref are IDENTICAL to fixtures/fea/hex_stiffness_reference.json.

constitutive_convention_locked.inputs: E0 (youngs_modulus), nu (poisson), k (z_knockdown) - the three materials.json numbers.
constitutive_convention_locked.mapping: E_p = E0; E_t = k*E0; nu_p = nu; nu_pt = nu (=> nu_tp = k*nu by compliance symmetry); G_p = E0/(2(1+nu)); G_t = k*G_p. Layer plane = XY, layer normal = +Z.
constitutive_convention_locked.compliance_matrix: S11=S22=1/E_p; S33=1/E_t; S12=-nu_p/E_p; S13=S23=-nu_pt/E_p; S44=1/G_p (gamma_xy); S55=S66=1/G_t (gamma_yz, gamma_zx); D = inv(S).
constitutive_convention_locked.reduction: At k=1 this is EXACTLY the isotropic law: K(nu, k=1) must equal the isotropic reference for the same nu bit-for-bit up to quadrature arithmetic (verified gap below 1e-15 here). The isotropic code path must remain available per ARCHITECTURE section 4.
constitutive_convention_locked.rationale: Interlayer shear and through-layer modulus are both governed by layer adhesion, so one knockdown factor covers E_t and G_t. This is the convention the whole pipeline (element, sensitivities, orientation scoring) must share.

comparison_tolerance: Entrywise: |K_ij - K_ref_ij| <= 1e-10 * max|K_ref| (absolute, scaled by matrix max). Same rule as the isotropic fixture.

required_properties.zero_energy_modes: exactly 6 (3 translations + 3 linearized rotations); all other eigenvalues strictly positive
required_properties.isotropic_reduction: K(E,nu,k=1,h) equals the isotropic element K(E,nu,h) entrywise within 1e-12 * max|K| - this is what preserves Gate V1 in isotropic mode
required_properties.constitutive_positive_definite: D from the locked mapping is SPD for all committed materials (verified for the cases below)
